caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or radio show. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text that reads "YOU NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a studio within a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hand as he speaks, indicating an animated discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional environment, blending elements of fashion and media production.
